summary:
Indinavir is specifically indicated only for treating HIV/AIDS and has no established role or efficacy in managing amyotrophic lateral sclerosis. It lacks any clinically supported mechanism or benefit related to neurodegeneration seen in ALS.  

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{No}}$

The summary should be strictly factual without adding interpretation beyond what was stated by Agent1.
